note: Batch 1 must complete before Batch 2+3. Batches 2 and 3 can run in parallel with each other after Batch 1 merges.

batches.name: Next.js Project Scaffold
batches.rationale: Everything depends on this. Must be merged to main before any style pages are created.

tasks.title: Initialize Next.js 15 project with Tailwind, Framer Motion, and gallery home page

batches.name: Style Pages — Wave 1 (styles 1-5)
batches.rationale: All 5 are independent pages. Run in parallel after Batch 1 merges.

tasks.title: Build Academia landing page (/styles/academia)
tasks.prompt:
Read AGENTS.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/ui-ux-guidelines.md, docs/animation-guide.md, and docs/page-template.tsx. Then read section '## 1. Academia' in designprompts_dev_all_styles.md.

Create app/styles/academia/page.tsx — a full, production-grade landing page implementing the Academia/Classical design system exactly as specified.

Requirements:
- 'use client' at top
- Fonts: Cormorant_Garamond (heading), Crimson_Pro (body), Cinzel (display/labels) via next/font/google
- Design tokens from the spec: background #1C1714, foreground #E8DFD4, accent #C9A962, etc.
- All 10 sections: Navbar, Hero, Stats, Features, ProductDetail, Pricing, Testimonials, FAQ, Newsletter, Footer
- Mandatory signature elements: arch-top images (border-radius: 40% 40% 0 0 / 20% 20% 0 0), sepia-to-color transitions, Roman numeral section labels (Volume I, II, III...), drop caps on first paragraphs, corner flourishes on cards, ornate dividers with glyphs, wax seal badges on featured items, brass interactive elements, engraved text shadows, paper texture + vignette overlays
- Framer Motion scroll-triggered entrances with dignified timing (500-700ms, ease-out)
- All content themed as scholarly/academic (use academic language, reference knowledge/scholarship)
- Fully responsive, mobile-first
- Touch targets minimum 44px
- useReducedMotion() respected

This page must look like a real premium website, not a template. Make deliberate creative choices.

tasks.title: Build Art Deco landing page (/styles/art-deco)
tasks.prompt:
Read AGENTS.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/ui-ux-guidelines.md, docs/animation-guide.md, and docs/page-template.tsx. Then read section '## 2. Art Deco' in designprompts_dev_all_styles.md.

Create app/styles/art-deco/page.tsx — a full, production-grade landing page implementing the Art Deco design system exactly as specified.

Requirements:
- 'use client' at top
- Fonts as specified in the Art Deco design system (check the spec)
- All design tokens from the spec
- All 10 sections: Navbar, Hero, Stats, Features, ProductDetail, Pricing, Testimonials, FAQ, Newsletter, Footer
- All mandatory signature elements for Art Deco as defined in the spec (geometric patterns, gold/black palette, sunburst motifs, stepped shapes, etc.)
- Framer Motion animations matching Art Deco personality (luxurious, cinematic, slow)
- Content themed for luxury/premium brand (hotel, high-end service, etc.)
- Fully responsive, mobile-first, touch targets 44px min
- useReducedMotion() respected

This page must look like a real premium Art Deco website. Make deliberate, non-generic design choices.

tasks.title: Build Bauhaus landing page (/styles/bauhaus)
tasks.prompt:
Read AGENTS.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/ui-ux-guidelines.md, docs/animation-guide.md, and docs/page-template.tsx. Then read section '## 3. Bauhaus' in designprompts_dev_all_styles.md.

Create app/styles/bauhaus/page.tsx — a full, production-grade landing page implementing the Bauhaus design system exactly as specified.

Requirements:
- 'use client' at top
- Fonts as specified in the Bauhaus design system
- All design tokens from the spec
- All 10 sections: Navbar, Hero, Stats, Features, ProductDetail, Pricing, Testimonials, FAQ, Newsletter, Footer
- All mandatory signature elements for Bauhaus (geometric shapes, primary colors only, grid-based layout, form-follows-function, no decoration for decoration's sake)
- Framer Motion animations: mechanical, precise, 300ms, linear easing
- Content themed for design/architecture tools
- Fully responsive, mobile-first, touch targets 44px min
- useReducedMotion() respected

This page must embody Bauhaus principles: beauty through function, geometric clarity, primary color boldness.

tasks.title: Build Bold Typography landing page (/styles/bold-typography)
tasks.prompt:
Read AGENTS.md, docs/architecture.md, docs/ui-ux-guidelines.md, docs/animation-guide.md, and docs/page-template.tsx. Then read section '## 4. Bold Typography' in designprompts_dev_all_styles.md.

Create app/styles/bold-typography/page.tsx — a full, production-grade landing page implementing the Bold Typography design system exactly as specified.

Requirements:
- 'use client' at top
- Fonts as specified in the Bold Typography design system (likely massive display fonts)
- All design tokens from the spec
- All 10 sections: Navbar, Hero, Stats, Features, ProductDetail, Pricing, Testimonials, FAQ, Newsletter, Footer
- All mandatory signature elements (type as primary visual element, oversized headlines, tight tracking, dramatic type contrasts)
- Framer Motion: type-reveal animations, staggered letter/word reveals if appropriate
- Content themed for editorial/publishing/media
- Fully responsive, mobile-first, touch targets 44px min
- useReducedMotion() respected

Let the typography do the design work. No generic card layouts — make type the hero.
